headline: AI accelerator supply constraints remain a watch item
snippet: NVIDIA demand remains strong, but analysts note that advanced packaging supply constraints could pressure revenue timing if capacity additions slip.

headline: Custom silicon competition increases in cloud AI
snippet: Large cloud customers continue to invest in internal AI accelerators, creating competitive risk and potential pricing pressure for merchant GPU suppliers.

headline: Export restrictions remain a sector uncertainty
snippet: Semiconductor firms with high exposure to advanced AI chips may face regulatory uncertainty from export controls and compliance requirements.
